title: rosa × dumetorum subvar. pseudocollina
intro: Rosa × dumetorum subvar. pseudocollina is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Rosa × dumetorum rose plant, characterized by its unique growth habit and fragrant flowers. The medicinal properties of Rosa × dumetorum subvar. pseudocollina include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its high content of essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in the treatment of digestive issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Rosa × dumetorum subvar. pseudocollina can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed internally or applied topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
